title: Prism Perms
description: Cross‑platform permissions plugin for Bukkit, BungeeCord, and Velocity. Lightweight YAML storage, simple commands, and rich stats tools (groups/users, ungrouped/missing/list, names cache) with pagination and safe output chunking.
body:
Prism Perms is a lightweight, cross‑platform permissions plugin for Minecraft servers. It provides simple, consistent group and user permission management across Bukkit/Spigot/Paper, BungeeCord, and Velocity without needing a database. Data is stored in readable YAML with built‑in backup/restore and live reload/watch.

- Uniform commands across all platforms for adding/removing groups and permissions
- Per‑user overrides (allow/deny) and group membership management
- Rich stats tools to inspect groups and users, including ungrouped/missing/list
- Pagination and safe chat chunking to prevent message overflows
- Online/offline player name resolution via a cached names store (timestamps persisted)
- Designed for small to medium servers that want a fast, file‑based solution

## Quick Commands
- Version: `/pp version`
- Groups: `/pp group add <name>`, `/pp group remove <name>`, `/pp group list`
- Group perms: `/pp group perm add <group> <perm>`, `/pp group perm remove <group> <perm>`, `/pp group perms list <group>`
- User groups: `/pp user setgroup <player> <group>`, `/pp user removegroup <player> <group>`
- User perms: `/pp user perm add <player> <perm>`, `/pp user perm remove <player> <perm>`
- User info: `/pp user list <player>`, `/pp user overrides <player>`
- Stats: `/pp stats users ...`, `/pp stats groups [members [limit]]`, `/pp stats verbose [group]`
- Backup/Restore: `/pp backup`, `/pp restore`

## Permissions
- Admin: `prismperms.admin`
